transcript.text: I have flu, so my voice is kind of like disappearing, so please bear with me.
But I hope you can hear me just well.
Yeah, I can hear you just fine, yeah.
It's so nice to meet you.
So nice to finally meet you.
So I'm going to share my screen and then let me know if you can see it on your side.
So the main agenda of this call today is to take you through about the company, some of the tools that we use.
The onboarding resources that you're going to go through, a few expectations on our side, and then I'll also give you an opportunity to ask me any questions that you have, okay?
So we can begin with an introduction.
Bridget is our VP of Ops, but unfortunately she's not going to make it to this call, so I'll be taking it today.
I'm an executive assistant at GrowthX.
I joined GrowthX around July last year, and I support the operations and the engineering department.
As I was saying, I joined growthx around July last year, and I support the operations and the engineering department.
I'm based in Nairobi, Kenya, but I work Pacific hours, so feel free to reach out to me between 7.30 a.m.
When I'm not working, I'm a mom of three.
I have three boys, and I enjoy listening to music.
I don't have a favorite genre.
As long as it's good music, I add it to my playlist.
So I'd also like to hear something about you.
Well, it's super nice to hear a bit about you.
I'm based currently in Curaçao, which is in the Caribbean, but I am from the UK and mostly normally in the UK.
I did my first half marathon this year.
I was training for my next one at the end of the month, just got an injury.
So I'm like figuring out, am I going to make it?
Am I going to push through?
And I'm also writing a science fiction novel in my spare time.
And on the weekends, I'm completing a master's in creative writing as well.
So that's kind of my two main things, running and writing.
You do a lot for one person.
So the next thing I'll take you through just very briefly on the tools that we use.
The first one is Slack, and I know you already set it up.
So this is for chatting, like, between one team member and another one in case you need, like, urgent responses.
And you also have some channels where we communicate.
Communicate with the clients, communicate between, we have both external and internal channels.
So for the external ones are shared between the clients and the growthx team, and the internal channels are for communication within the growthx team.
And so the other tool is Geekbot.
So have you used Geekbot before?
So this is a software that has been integrated into Slack.
You don't have to do any installation on your side.

So I'll just, when you're done with your onboarding, let's say the second week, when you're done with your onboarding, and when you've been assigned to an account or to your pod, I'll add you to that specific pod's Geekbot.
So every morning you'll be getting a prompt.
So it can be a question like, what are your priorities for today?
Do you have any questions for the team?
So all you have to do whenever you get the prompt, come here to the chat.
That respond to the chat, and then it will send it to the relevant channel.
So Linear is our project management tool, and I'll take you through it as well.
So this is where we track, we keep track of the tasks or projects that we are working on.
And we also use Linear to raise IT tickets for the IT, for the engineering department.
So we raise tickets in Linear whenever you're encountering an issue, so which is easier for the engineering team to keep track of.
And you'll read about Linear when you're going through your onboarding resources.
Notion is our knowledge management tool.
So this is where we store documents, SOPs, documents.
We also have shared workspaces in Notion where we store client documents, and it's shared.
Between the clients and growthx team.
So we use that for knowledge management.
We also use Loom for screen recording.
Zoom, the one we're using now for meetings, and then Fathom for notetaker.
So I'm going to check you through the onboarding document in Notion.
So when, now I know you have access to Notion, right?
So when you log into Notion, you'll see a search icon here on the left side.
So you can type a handbook.
And you can also bookmark it so that it's easier to find.
Oh, you're giving me an easy time.
When you search for the handbook, there's an onboarding section right here.
You click on onboarding resources here.
And then we have the company-wide onboarding.
So this is what it looks like.
And then we've divided the onboarding into day one, what you're going to do for today.
And then what you're going to do within week one.
Day one is all about getting set up on your company tools, which I know you've already started doing.
And also meeting your team members.
So I'm setting up your one-password notion, Zoom, etc.
And then for week one, there's a bunch of stuff to read, to watch, and some meetings to attend.
And you also get to meet with your manager.
Can you see on my screen?
Panza will be able to walk you through the onboarding process.

He'll be your manager, like for now, but then after you're done with the onboarding, you'll be assigned to your manager, now the real manager, because you'll be reporting to a director, and that will be done when you're done with onboarding.
But for now, Panza can guide you, and I asked his EA to set up a meeting between you and Matthew.
Matthew, she's going to do that, and Matthew will also, his name is Matthew or Panza, he'll also assign an onboarding buddy to you.

So an onboarding buddy is someone apart from your manager, like a colleague that you can reach out to whenever you have any questions, or if you run into any issues, or if you're not sure what to do, or how to use a certain tool, they can help you with that.
So that is for week one and week two, mainly.
So I put the month one here for the meeting with RCE.
Because most of the times he doesn't have time.
But then you have a call with him next week, though.
So that is what the onboarding document looks like in Notion.
So we just duplicated that in linear so that you can keep track of each task that you're supposed to work on.
So when you log into linear, you'll see the workspace section here.
So click on projects and then go to my projects.
So you'll get a list of the projects that you've been assigned to.
The first one, let me open that.
So when you open it, go to issues at the top line here, click on issues.

The tasks that you're supposed to work on, each task has, when you click on a task, it has a link, because you know the onboarding document is in Notion, so it has a link to the Notion document, so let me click on this, it takes you to that task, so team directory, maybe fill out the team directory, just come here and then add your profile, add your picture base and that.

So when you're done with that task, just go back, you see the dotted circle, when you click on that, it's for updating the status, so is it in progress, is it done, is it backlog, so you can update the status there, where the dotted circle is, and then we have the tags, we have that in blue and red.
So blue is for day one, so these are the tasks that you're supposed to work on today, but it's not a must, something like meeting your manager.
I know sometimes schedules change, so it doesn't have to happen.
And the way it's written here.
And if you have any questions, just ping me on Slack.
So we have the day one tasks.
We have week one and week two here.
And when you're done with the entire project, just come to the status on the right section for the entire project.
Just click on here and mark it as completed.
Do you have any questions so far?
So let's go back to the deck.
So we have a few expectations.
The first one is since most of us are located in various locations, growthx requires at least four hours of overlap with Pacific time.
And the other expectation is daily Geekbot updates.
The one I just showed you, the check-in, daily check-in.
So that is mandatory for everyone.
Get added to GeekBot later in the process, right?
When you're done with onboarding, if you get a site, a pod, you can just reach out to me and I'll add you to the GeekBot.
Yeah, you don't have to do that now.
So that is the director, the managing editors, and the content manager.
So a pod consists of different people working on a certain account.
Let me show you that in Notion.
You have the client database here.
So this is our client database.
So Jakub, Jakub is the director for this pod.
So the pod contains these managing editors that are under Jakub and content managers that are under Jakub.
So you're assigned to one director.
So Panzer will start with you right now.
But then when you're done, you'll be assigned to the director that you'll be reporting to.
And so I'll need to add you to that director's gig bot.
And in Slack, let me see, pod Jacob.
And you see, whenever they respond to gig bot, it posts it in this channel.
So this is what they're working on.
And so whenever you get assigned to your director, I'll add you to the gig bot.
And whenever you respond to the gig bot prompt, it will be sending it to the channel.
The first one is the time of policy, but you'll read this in detail whenever you have time.
But the TLDR here is that there's no...
It's unlimited PTO, so there's no maximum.
Just make sure that you don't overdo it.
So, and there's no approval required.
So all you have to do is whenever you're going on PTO.
So Patricia's out of office today.
Just go to the calendar, you block it, and then you add your team.
So just make sure that you give enough notice.
Just go to the calendar, block the time, add your team to it.
So we also have an employee referral program.
If you refer people to growthx, you get paid.
So for engineering roles, you'll get up to 10K USD.
For non-engineering roles, you'll get up to 5K USD.
Fathom stays in growthx up to six months to make sure that they're the right fit.
We also have a Slack channel.
I know right now you'll be setting up your tools.
In case you can't access any tool or if you're running into issues, we have an IT and tools channel.
So just come here, say what your issue is, and then you can see either me or Yusuf.
So Yusuf is our head of cybersecurity and IT.
So if you're running into issues with the tools, you can come here, post it, CC Yusuf or me, and we can help you with that.
And then just a heads up, we usually have biweekly, all hands meeting, and the next one is tomorrow.
So during the call, yeah, so you can just start preparing.
You'll be required to introduce yourself to the team.
You just say your name, where your base, any fun facts about you.
And let me know if you have the invite.
I saw you have the invite already.
But I think I, yeah, company all hands.
Now, lastly, we have this email.
And this is the email that we use mostly to access the shared tools.
So for the company tools, most of them are shared.
So we use this same email to log into the tools and I can help you log into it.
Have you set up your one password already?
If you don't mind sharing your screen, please.
And then I can take you through on how to set up the email.
So you can open Gmail in the Chrome.
And then on your profile where the growthx icon in is, you can add an account.
And then now you need to, do you have, yeah, the 1Password extension, you can click on that.
And then, oh, what was my password?
Yeah, you need to log into my password.
Okay, I set this up on Friday and I'm not sure exactly what my password is at the moment.
Yeah, I'll need to double check that, sorry.
What have I had to do?
Yeah, I set up so many different accounts on Friday that I'm not exactly sure which one it was.
I might need to reset it, actually.
I can help you do that.
Should I reset it right now?
That would be awesome, yeah, thank you.
Oh, looks like, oh, actually, I've got it.
Yeah, I just got the email.
Here, I'll go through and do this.
Okay, so let's go back to Gmail.
Um, well, yeah, so you need to open the extension now, the one password extension.
There's an autofill button at the right side.
Um, at the right side, yeah.
So click on get a verification from the Google Authenticator.
The email that we use for client, both client tools and for the company tools.
So let's say it's ChartGPT, the company ChartGPT.
just go to ChartGPT and then log in using Google and then not your personal email.
So you'd use team at growthxlabs.com.
Do you have any questions for me?
No, I think everything's really clear so far.

So just a reminder for you to watch the onboarding bootcamp recordings during the onboarding project before you go into the call, especially with the one with Marcel, just to make sure that it's as efficient as possible.
Any issues, any questions you can ask me?
So you don't have a question now?
No, sort of, I kind of went through on Friday and set up most of the tools and accounts with the tools.
So, yeah, I'm just looking forward to kind of jumping into the notion with all the different onboarding documents and kind of reading that through.
Yeah, no kind of questions come to mind now.
Okay, in case you run into any issues, just pay me, okay?
Yeah, it was great meeting you.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Gabrielle to GrowthX tools, processes, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Onboarding Path:** Use the `Onboarding` project in Linear to track tasks, which link directly to their corresponding resources in the `Handbook` in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Initial Manager:** Matthew Orpanza is the temporary manager for onboarding; he will assign an "onboarding buddy" for peer support.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [**Key Expectations:** Maintain a 4-hour daily overlap with Pacific Time (PT) and complete mandatory daily Geekbot check-ins once assigned to a "pod."](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [**Shared Login:** Use `team@growthxlabs.com` for all company tool logins, managed via 1Password.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Process

  - [**Central Hub:** The `Handbook` in Notion contains all onboarding resources, organized by Day 1, Week 1, and Week 2.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [**Task Management:** The `Onboarding` project in Linear tracks all tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [**Task Links:** Each task links directly to its corresponding Notion resource.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Status Updates:** Update task status (e.g., `In Progress`, `Done`) using the dotted circle icon.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [**Tags:** Tags (e.g., `Day 1`, `Week 1`) indicate task priority.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**Initial Manager:** Matthew Orpanza will guide the onboarding process.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**Action:** Matthew will assign an "onboarding buddy" for peer support.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
      - [**Note:** After onboarding, Gabrielle will be assigned to a permanent director.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)

### Company Tools & Systems

  - [**Slack:** Primary communication tool for internal and external (client) channels.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [**Geekbot:** A Slack integration for mandatory daily check-ins (priorities, blockers).](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [**Activation:** Alice will add Gabrielle to a pod's Geekbot *after* onboarding is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Linear:** Project management tool for tracking tasks and submitting IT tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [**Notion:** Knowledge management hub for SOPs, documents, and shared client workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [**Loom:** Screen recording.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**Zoom:** Video conferencing.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**Fathom:** AI notetaker.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

### Company Policies & Culture

  - [**Time Overlap:** A 4-hour daily overlap with Pacific Time (PT) is required.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [**PTO:** Unlimited PTO policy.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Process:** Block time on the calendar and notify the team; no approval is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Referral Program:**](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [**Engineering:** Up to $10k USD.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [**Non-Engineering:** Up to $5k USD.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [**Condition:** Referred hire must remain employed for 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - **IT Support:** Use the `#it-and-tools` Slack channel for issues.
      - [**Process:** Post the issue and CC Alice or Yusuf (Head of IT).](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**All-Hands Meeting:** The next meeting is tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [**Action:** Gabrielle must prepare a brief self-introduction (name, location, fun fact).](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

### Shared Login Setup

  - [**Purpose:** The `team@growthxlabs.com` email is the standard login for all company tools.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
    1.  [Add the `team@growthxlabs.com` account in Gmail.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
    2.  [Use the 1Password extension to autofill credentials.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
    3.  [Enter the 2FA code from the Google Authenticator app.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Gabrielle:**](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [Complete Day 1 tasks in the Linear `Onboarding` project.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [Prepare self-introduction for tomorrow's All-Hands meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [Watch onboarding bootcamp recordings (especially Marcel's) before the call.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [**Alice:**](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [Add Gabrielle to Geekbot after onboarding is complete and a pod is assigned.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Matthew Orpanza:**](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [Assign an onboarding buddy to Gabrielle.](https://fathom.video/share/5sbRy2sHgpVB-9hMtmsdoqg7YE7jXRDA?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

action_items.description: Complete Day 1 onboarding in Linear/Notion; update team directory w/ photo + base
Watch onboarding bootcamp recordings before Marcel call
